This image displays a simple, digitally created graphic featuring basic shapes on a solid blue background.

The most prominent element is a large, vibrant yellow circle, centrally located in the upper half of the image. This circle has a thin orange outline, creating a defined edge against the blue background. Inside the yellow circle, slightly off-center towards the right, the words "Test Image" are written in small, black sans-serif font.

Below the yellow circle, and positioned towards the bottom of the image, is a rectangular bar. This bar is dark green in color and extends horizontally across a significant portion of the lower frame. It is wider than it is tall, giving it a flat, elongated appearance.

The background of the entire image is a uniform light blue, suggesting a clear sky or an empty, abstract space. The overall impression is one of a basic illustration or a placeholder image due to the "Test Image" text. The colors are bold and primary, contributing to a clean and straightforward aesthetic.
